title: gelsemium sempervirens
intro: Gelsemium sempervirens, also known as Yellow Jessamine or Carolina Jasmine, is a perennial, evergreen vine native to the southeastern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to relax the nervous system, reduce stress and promote deep sleep, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, PMS, and migraines. Herbal preparations of Gelsemium sempervirens include teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used orally or topically, depending on the specific condition being treated.
